mapper.select:
/* AuthorInExRegistMapper.getSearchUserInfoDtlList */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USER_NM , A.AUTH_GRP_CD , A.ORGN_FG , A.ORGN_FG2 , A.ORGN_GRP_CD , A.ORGN_GRP_NM , A.ORGN_CD , A.ORGN_NM , A.STORE_CD , A.STORE_NM , A.STORE_SYS_STAT_FG , A.HQ_OFFICE_CD , A.HQ_OFFICE_NM , A.HQ_SYS_STAT_FG , A.EMP_NO , A.LAST_LOGIN_DT , A.LAST_PWD_CHG_DT , A.LOGIN_FAIL_CNT , A.USER_STAT_FG , A.P_AGENCY_CD , A.AREA_FG , A.V_USER_ID , A.WEB_USE_YN , A.SERVICE_FG , A.USE_YN , A.WEB_USER_USE_YN FROM TB_WB_USER_INFO_DTL_V01 A WHERE 1=1
AND A.USER_ID LIKE '%'||#{userId}||'%'
AND A.USER_NM LIKE '%'||#{userNm}||'%'
ORDER BY A.USER_ID

/* AuthorInExRegistMapper.getSearchUserRegMenuList */ SELECT A.USER_ID , B.AUTH_GRP_CD , A.RESRCE_CD , C.RESRCE_NM , A.INCLD_EXCLD_FG , A.AUTHOR_PRODC_FG , C.USE_YN , DECODE(D.RESRCE_CD , NULL, '미포함', '포함') AS AUTH_GRP_FG , E.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS EXCEPT_IN_EX_FG , F.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS ORGN_IN_EX_FG , A.REMARK , A.LOGIN_FG FROM TB_WB_AUTHOR_USER_IN_EX A , TB_WB_USER_INFO_DTL_V01 B , TB_WB_RESRCE_INFO C , TB_WB_AUTHOR_GRP_RESRCE D , TB_WB_AUTHOR_EXCEPT E , TB_WB_AUTHOR_ORGN_IN_EX F WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND C.RESRCE_CD = A.RESRCE_CD AND D.AUTH_GRP_CD (+) = B.AUTH_GRP_CD AND D.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND E.USER_ID (+) = A.USER_ID AND E.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND F.ORGN_CD (+) = B.ORGN_CD AND F.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD ORDER BY A.RESRCE_CD

/* AuthorInExRegistMapper.getSearchUserNoRegMenuList */
SELECT A.RESRCE_CD , A.RESRCE_NM , B.USER_ID , DECODE(C.RESRCE_CD , NULL, '미포함', '포함') AS AUTH_GRP_FG , D.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS EXCEPT_IN_EX_FG , E.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS ORGN_IN_EX_FG , A.USE_YN
FROM TB_WB_RESRCE_INFO A , TB_WB_USER_INFO_DTL_V01 B , TB_WB_AUTHOR_GRP_RESRCE C , TB_WB_AUTHOR_EXCEPT D , TB_WB_AUTHOR_ORGN_IN_EX E WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_WB_RESRCE_INFO B WHERE B.P_RESRCE = A.RESRCE_CD ) AND A.RESRCE_CD NOT IN ( SELECT RESRCE_CD FROM TB_WB_AUTHOR_USER_IN_EX WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) AND A.RESRCE_FG = 'M' AND B.USER_ID = #{userId} AND C.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND C.AUTH_GRP_CD (+) = B.AUTH_GRP_CD AND D.USER_ID (+) = B.USER_ID AND D.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND E.ORGN_CD (+) = B.ORGN_CD AND E.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD
AND A.RESRCE_CD LIKE '%'||#{resrceCd}||'%'
AND A.RESRCE_NM LIKE '%'||#{resrceNm}||'%'
AND C.RESRCE_CD IS NOT NULL
AND C.RESRCE_CD IS NULL
ORDER BY A.RESRCE_CD

/* AuthorInExRegistMapper.getSearchOrgnInfoDtlList */ SELECT A.HQ_OFFICE_CD , A.HQ_OFFICE_NM , B.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM FROM TB_HQ_OFFICE A , TB_MS_STORE B WHERE B.HQ_OFFICE_CD (+) = A.HQ_OFFICE_CD
AND UPPER(A.HQ_OFFICE_CD) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#{hqOfficeCd})||'%'
AND A.HQ_OFFICE_NM LIKE '%'||#{hqOfficeNm}||'%'
AND UPPER(B.STORE_CD) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#{storeCd})||'%'
AND B.STORE_NM LIKE '%'||#{storeNm}||'%'
ORDER BY A.HQ_OFFICE_CD , B.STORE_CD

/* AuthorInExRegistMapper.getSearchOrgnRegMenuList */ SELECT A.ORGN_CD , B.AUTH_GRP_CD , A.RESRCE_CD , C.RESRCE_NM , A.INCLD_EXCLD_FG , A.AUTHOR_PRODC_FG , C.USE_YN , DECODE(D.RESRCE_CD , NULL, '미포함', '포함') AS AUTH_GRP_FG , E.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS EXCEPT_IN_EX_FG , F.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS USER_IN_EX_FG , A.REMARK , A.LOGIN_FG FROM TB_WB_AUTHOR_ORGN_IN_EX A , TB_WB_USER_INFO_DTL_V01 B , TB_WB_RESRCE_INFO C , TB_WB_AUTHOR_GRP_RESRCE D , TB_WB_AUTHOR_EXCEPT E , TB_WB_AUTHOR_USER_IN_EX F WHERE A.ORGN_CD = #{orgnCd} AND B.ORGN_CD = A.ORGN_CD AND B.EMP_NO = '0000' AND C.RESRCE_CD = A.RESRCE_CD AND D.AUTH_GRP_CD (+) = B.AUTH_GRP_CD AND D.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND E.USER_ID (+) = B.USER_ID AND E.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND F.USER_ID (+) = B.USER_ID AND F.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD ORDER BY A.RESRCE_CD

/* AuthorInExRegistMapper.getSearchOrgnNoRegMenuList */
SELECT A.RESRCE_CD , A.RESRCE_NM , B.ORGN_CD , DECODE(C.RESRCE_CD , NULL, '미포함', '포함') AS AUTH_GRP_FG , D.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS EXCEPT_IN_EX_FG , E.INCLD_EXCLD_FG AS USER_IN_EX_FG , A.USE_YN
FROM TB_WB_RESRCE_INFO A , TB_WB_USER_INFO_DTL_V01 B , TB_WB_AUTHOR_GRP_RESRCE C , TB_WB_AUTHOR_EXCEPT D , TB_WB_AUTHOR_USER_IN_EX E WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_WB_RESRCE_INFO B WHERE B.P_RESRCE = A.RESRCE_CD ) AND A.RESRCE_CD NOT IN ( SELECT RESRCE_CD FROM TB_WB_AUTHOR_ORGN_IN_EX WHERE ORGN_CD = #{orgnCd} ) AND A.RESRCE_FG = 'M' AND B.ORGN_CD = #{orgnCd} AND B.EMP_NO = '0000' AND C.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND C.AUTH_GRP_CD (+) = B.AUTH_GRP_CD AND D.USER_ID (+) = B.USER_ID AND D.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD AND E.USER_ID (+) = B.USER_ID AND E.RESRCE_CD (+) = A.RESRCE_CD
AND A.RESRCE_CD LIKE '%'||#{resrceCd}||'%'
AND A.RESRCE_NM LIKE '%'||#{resrceNm}||'%'
AND C.RESRCE_CD IS NOT NULL
AND C.RESRCE_CD IS NULL
ORDER BY A.RESRCE_CD
